---
title: "Mojo: An MLIR-Based Language for HPC"
author: "Yannick"
date: today
abstract: |
  Mojo is a new systems language built on MLIR...
---


{{< include sections/introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/background_mlir.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/mlir_to_mojo.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/mojo_hpc.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/benchmarking.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/discussion.qmd >}}

::: {#refs}
:::
